7 #ifndef IOBUFFER_H_
8 #define IOBUFFER_H_
9 
10 #include <arcane/utils/Iostream.h>
11 #include <arcane/utils/StdHeader.h>
12 #include <arcane/utils/HashTableMap.h>
13 #include <arcane/utils/ValueConvert.h>
14 #include <arcane/utils/String.h>
15 #include <arcane/utils/IOException.h>
16 #include <arcane/utils/Collection.h>
17 #include <arcane/utils/Enumerator.h>
18 #include <arcane/ArcaneVersion.h>
19 #if (ARCANE_VERSION >= 12201)
20 #include <arcane/utils/Array.h>
21 #else /* ARCANE_VERSION */
22 #include <arcane/utils/CArray.h>
23 #endif /* ARCANE_VERSION */
24 
25 #include <sstream>
26 
27 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
28 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
29 
30 class IOFile
31 {
32 public:
33  static const int BUFSIZE = 10000;
34 public:
35  IOFile(istream* stream) : m_stream(stream) {}
36  virtual ~IOFile() { }
37  const char* getNextLine();
38  Real getReal();
39  Integer getInteger();
40  template<class T> void getValue(T& v) ;
41  bool isEnd(){ (*m_stream) >> ws; return m_stream->eof(); }
42 private:
43  istream* m_stream;
44  char m_buf[BUFSIZE];
45 };
46 
47 template<>
48 void IOFile::getValue(Real& x) ;
49 template<>
50 void IOFile::getValue(Integer& i) ;
51 template<>
52 void IOFile::getValue(String& str) ;
53 
54 template<class T>
55 void IOFile::getValue(T& v)
56 {
57  (*m_stream) >> ws >> v;
58  if (m_stream->good())
59  return ;
60  throw Arcane::IOException("IOFile::getValue()","Bad Type");
61 }
62 
63 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
64 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
65 
66 class _Split
67 {
68 private:
69  template<class T> friend bool readBufferFromStringBuffer(const String& strbuffer,
70  Array<T> &buffer,
71  const String sep,
72  Integer size);
73  template<class T> friend bool readBufferFromStringBuffer(const String& strbuffer,
74  Array<T> &buffer,
75  const String sep);
76 
77  template<class T>
78  static void split(const String& str,Array<T>& buffer,const String& sep,Integer size) ;
79 };
80 
81 
82 template<>
83 void _Split::split(const String& str,Array<Integer>& buffer,const String& sep,Integer size) ;
84 
85 template<>
86 void _Split::split(const String& str,Array<Real>& buffer,const String& sep,Integer size) ;
87 
88 template<>
89 void _Split::split(const String& str,Array<String>& buffer,const String& sep,Integer size) ;
90 
91 
92 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
93 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
94 
95 template<class T>
96 bool readBufferFromFile(const String& file_name,
97  Array<T> &buffer,
98  Integer size)
99 {
100  if(buffer.size()<size)
101  {
102  cout<<"Buffer size is too small"<<endl ;
103  return false ;
104  }
105  ifstream ifile(file_name.localstr());
106  if (!ifile){
107  cout << "Impossible d'ouvrir en lecture le fichier '"
108  << file_name.localstr() << "'"<<endl;
109  return false;
110  }
111  IOFile file(&ifile);
112  Integer count = 0 ;
113 
114  try
115  {
116  while(!file.isEnd())
117  {
118  T x ;
119  file.getValue(x) ;
120  buffer[count] = x ;
121  count++ ;
122  if(count==size) break ;
123  }
124  if(count<size) cout <<"Warning there are less element than : "<<size<<endl ;
125  return true ;
126  }
127  catch(Arcane::IOException e)
128  {
129  cerr<<"Reading file problem :"<<e<<endl ;
130  return false ;
131  }
132 }
133 
134 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
135 
136 template<class T>
137 bool readBufferFromStringBuffer(const String& strbuffer,
138  Array<T> &buffer,
139  const String sep,
140  Integer size)
141 {
142  if(buffer.size()<size)
143  {
144  cout<<"Buffer size is too small"<<endl ;
145  return false ;
146  }
147  _Split::split(strbuffer,buffer,sep,size) ;
148  return true ;
149 }
150 
151 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
152 
153 template<class T>
154 bool readBufferFromStringBuffer(const String& strbuffer,
155  Array<T> &buffer,
156  const String sep)
157 {
158  _Split::split(strbuffer,buffer,sep,0) ;
159  return true ;
160 }
161 
162 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
163 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
164 
165 #endif /*IOBUFFER_H_*/
